name: Tessy

handling.tone: Stuck lead with two structural blockers (invalid phone + out-of-zone geography). One well-crafted email addressing both directly. Don't quote elaborately for a lead with this many blockers.
handling.voice_adjustments: Andre voice: brief, honest about logistics, asks for working number. Don't waste each other's time.
handling.context: Inbound Apr 18 from FB Lead Form. Phone 321-317-3920 returns invalid (321 = Florida Brevard County area code on a Vermont resident — possibly recent transplant or typo). Fairlee VT 05051 is ~150 mi from Comeketo zone. No response to any outreach. Vague 'gathering' description.

context_anchors: Fairlee VT 05051 — Orange County VT, ~150 mi from us, OUT-OF-ZONE
321 area code = Florida (Brevard) — possible transplant or typo

lead.source: FB Lead Form — VIDEO RODS WEDDING & FACELESS
lead.next_move: One email asking for (1) working phone, (2) honest geography clarification — 'specifically wanting Comeketo or also exploring local VT?'

enrichment.identity_notes: 'Tessy' single name = likely nickname (Theresa, Tessa, etc.). 321 (Florida Brevard / Space Coast) on VT resident interesting — recent transplant, ported number, or form typo. Email is only working contact.
win_angles: Geography reality check — Fairlee VT is 3-hour drive each way
Long runway = patience, wait for her to respond
Vague event description = need clarity before pitching
nepq_openers: Continuation: 'Hi Tessy — wanted to circle back. Two things to make sure we don't waste each other's time: (1) Could you send a working phone number? 321-317-3920 isn't going through. (2) Quick reality check — your zip is Fairlee VT, ~3 hours from us. We CAN come up there for the right event, but it adds real cost. Is the gathering specifically wanting Comeketo, or also exploring local Vermont caterers?'

Frame: 'What kind of gathering is the September 20th event? 40 guests is a sweet spot for several formats — knowing if it's family reunion, anniversary, milestone birthday, etc. helps me tell you what's realistic.'
open_gaps: Geographic feasibility — can/should we even quote?
enrichment.strategic_note: Stuck lead with two structural blockers: invalid phone + out-of-zone. One well-crafted email addressing BOTH directly. If she comes back with working phone AND confirms wanting Comeketo specifically (despite haul), real deal. If not, long-term followup. Don't quote elaborately for lead with this many blockers — get blockers resolved first.

comms.summary: Call attempt — number returned INVALID error

notes: One email then long-term followup if no response
